title: WebSocketConnectorOptions
description: Constructor options for WebSocketConnector — native browser WebSocket adapter. Source: packages/connector-websocket/src/WebSocketConnector.ts.

protocols.description: Sub-protocol(s) passed to the WebSocket constructor.

reconnectDelay.description: Milliseconds to wait between reconnect attempts.

maxReconnectAttempts.description: Stop reconnecting after this many failed attempts.
